---
title: "Resources"
subtitle: "All curated resources across R, Stata, macroeconomics, econometrics, and causal inference"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: all-resources
    contents:
      - "rstudio/*.qmd"
      - "stata/*.qmd"
      - "macro/*.qmd"
      - "econometrics/*.qmd"
      - "causalinference/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
    image-height: 280px
    page-size: 12
---

:::{#all-resources}
:::
